title: DodagState select_parent: hysteresis logic inverted
description: In python/src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py DodagState.select_parent(), the hysteresis check changed from 'best_cost > current_cost - threshold' to 'improvement < threshold'. This is semantically equivalent ONLY if improvement is defined as current_cost - best_cost. However, the logic now checks 'if improvement < threshold' and keeps current parent, which is correct. BUT the docstring/comment says 'switch only if improvement exceeds threshold' yet the code keeps current when improvement is BELOW threshold. This is correct behavior but the comment/code alignment should be verified.
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-aa0f. The hysteresis logic refactoring should be verified but is not necessarily inverted.
